bundle.name: AI Agent Defence
bundle.tagline: Two-layer prompt guard + voice alerts — all self-hosted
bundle.description: Complete self-hosted AI agent protection bundle. Includes neural prompt injection detection (Superagent guard-1.7B via Ollama), regex-based input sanitization (Ruflo AIDefence), and voice synthesis for spoken security briefings (Voicebox). Zero external API calls — all inference runs on your infrastructure.

skills.role: Neural guard — classifies LLM inputs via self-hosted Ollama model (~200ms)
Regex guard — 27 patterns for injection, traversal, command attacks (<1ms)
Voice alerts — spoken threat briefings via self-hosted Voicebox TTS

marketingCopy.headline: Self-Hosted Agent Defence
marketingCopy.subheadline: Two-layer prompt guard + voice alerts — zero external API calls
valueProps: Neural prompt injection detection via Superagent guard-1.7B running on local Ollama
27 regex patterns for injection, path traversal, and command injection in <1ms
Voice synthesis for spoken security briefings via self-hosted Voicebox
Zero data leaves your infrastructure — HIPAA/GDPR compliant by architecture
Auto-chunking for large inputs with parallel classification
Fail-open design — guard unreachable = request proceeds
